basis: Synthetic hand-worked example (see BASIS.md, calc 0.3.0 section). NOT an FTA-certified figure; regression anchor only. Pins vrh_v0 CALC_VERSION 0.3.0 (block-aware layover inclusion, handoff 0003) over fixture_block.json, with the 0.2.0 comparison values on the SAME positions.

block_fixture.comment: One vehicle (veh-301), one block (blk-1), two clean trips (trip-D, trip-E) with a 600 s inter-trip layover. v0.3 groups the block as ONE VRH group and INCLUDES the 600 s (<= layover_max_seconds 1800); the retained v0.2 per-trip grouping EXCLUDES it. VRM stays 0.2.0: layover miles are N/A per Exhibit 35.

vrh_v0_2_comparison.comment: compute_vrh_v0_2 over the identical positions: per-trip grouping drops the 600 s layover — 0.33 h - 0.17 h ~= the 600 s (0.1666... h) recovered by v0.3.

vrm_v0_2.comment: VRM is unchanged at 0.2.0 (layover miles N/A per Exhibit 35): 10 meridian legs of 0.01 degrees.

original_fixture_fallback.comment: The ORIGINAL fixture.json clean subset (trip-A + trip-B, no block_id anywhere) under v0.3: per-trip fallback reproduces the 0.2.0 value exactly, plus one block_unavailable INFO finding per vehicle-day.
